questions.question: Explain the concept of Virtual Memory and how it differs from Physical Memory.
questions.hint: Describe the key differences and relationship between Virtual Memory and Physical Memory.

questions.question: What is the primary function of the Page Replacement Algorithm in Virtual Memory Management?
questions.hint: Elaborate on the purpose and types of Page Replacement Algorithms.

questions.question: Describe the role of the Page Table in Virtual Memory Management.
questions.hint: Explain how Page Tables enable efficient memory management and access to memory.
